summary: Phase O.4 (explicit opt-in expense inclusion) tested backend + frontend end-to-end. All 50 targeted regression tests pass, 2 new supplemental tests added (RBAC admin toggle + submit-validation regression) and pass. Frontend drawer shows checkboxes, include-all/include-none buttons behave correctly, Manual expenses stat card updates dynamically, and Petrol rows carry a 'fuel' badge and never contribute to Manual expenses.
critical_code_review_comments: reimbursement.py is 840 lines — consider splitting into submodules (totals, hydrate, endpoints) as it approaches complexity limits.

toggle_expense_inclusion returns _hydrate(report) which re-reads report — good, but consider adding an idempotency short-circuit when included flag matches current state to avoid needless writes/audits.
test_credentials: tm1@field.io/tm123, admin@field.io/admin123 — verified via /app/memory/test_credentials.md and login endpoint
seed_data_creation: Test-scoped expenses created with vendor prefix pytest-o4-* and pytest-o4rbac-* (auto-cleaned by module fixtures).
context_for_next_testing_agent: Explicit opt-in model verified: totals.manual_expenses_total starts at 0 on fresh report; PATCH /reimbursement/reports/{rid}/expenses/{eid} with {included:true/false} toggles link. Petrol never contributes to manual_expenses_total (only to petrol_receipts_total). Submit validation still enforces receipt-on-linked-only. UI checkboxes verified using data-testid=expense-include-{id}, include-all-btn, include-none-btn. Backend test suites run in ~28s.
